name: draft
description: Ephemeral scratchpad scaffolder — `/draft <slug>` creates `drafts/<slug>.md` for temporary working notes designed to be discarded. The `drafts/` dir is auto-added to .gitignore so files never commit by accident. Verbs — bare = list current drafts (mtime-sorted) + usage hint · `<slug>` = scaffold a new draft with a timestamped template (context · observations · ideas · TODO) · `list` = same as bare · `clean` = list `rm` candidates (read-only; user runs `rm -rf drafts` or `rm drafts/<slug>.md`). Distinct from `/inbox` (which scaffolds into a typed taxonomy `notes`/`patches`/`poc`/`rfc_drafts` intended for eventual upgrade): `/draft` files are explicitly throwaway. Slug accepts alnum / dash / underscore / dot only. Plugin command (markdown-only, no script). Triggers: /draft · 드래프트 · draft 만들어 · 임시 메모 · scratchpad · 정리 노트 · 나중에 폐기.
